items.title: PhysX-Omni: Unified Simulation-Ready Physical 3D Generation for Rigid, Deformable, and Articulated Objects
items.summary: Researchers introduce PhysX-Omni, a novel framework for generating physically accurate 3D objects across various types, suitable for simulation environments.

items.title: From an Abandoned Hackathon Project to an AI Study Workspace
items.summary: A developer shares the journey of transforming a hackathon project into a functional AI-powered study workspace, demonstrating practical application development.

items.title: LatentOmni: Rethinking Omni-Modal Understanding via Unified Audio-Visual Latent Reasoning
items.summary: This paper proposes LatentOmni, a new approach to achieve comprehensive omni-modal understanding by unifying audio-visual latent reasoning.

items.title: Forecasting Scientific Progress with Artificial Intelligence
items.summary: A new study explores the use of AI to predict future scientific advancements, offering insights into the trajectory of research and innovation.

items.title: SEGA: Spectral-Energy Guided Attention for Resolution Extrapolation in Diffusion Transformers
items.summary: Researchers present SEGA, a method that uses spectral-energy guided attention to enable resolution extrapolation in diffusion transformers, improving image generation capabilities.

items.title: WorldKV: Efficient World Memory with World Retrieval and Compression
items.summary: This paper introduces WorldKV, a system designed for efficient world memory management through advanced retrieval and compression techniques, potentially enhancing AI agent capabilities.

items.title: Spreadsheet-RL: Advancing Large Language Model Agents on Realistic Spreadsheet Tasks via Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: A new research paper details Spreadsheet-RL, an approach that uses reinforcement learning to significantly improve LLM agents' performance on complex spreadsheet tasks.

items.title: Ferrari is using IBM’s AI to create F1 superfans
items.summary: Ferrari partners with IBM to leverage AI in enhancing fan engagement and creating a more immersive experience for Formula 1 enthusiasts.

items.title: Sensor2Sensor: Cross-Embodiment Sensor Conversion for Autonomous Driving
items.summary: Researchers propose Sensor2Sensor, a method for converting sensor data across different autonomous driving platforms, improving data interoperability and model generalization.

items.title: Gated DeltaNet-2: Decoupling Erase and Write in Linear Attention
items.summary: This paper introduces Gated DeltaNet-2, an advancement in linear attention mechanisms that effectively decouples erase and write operations for improved efficiency and performance.

items.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
items.summary: OpenAI announces its expansion into Singapore, aiming to foster AI innovation and collaboration within the region.

items.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
items.summary: OpenAI outlines the next steps in its global education initiative, focusing on expanding AI literacy and access to learning resources in various countries.

items.title: When AI Reads Blueprints: The Hidden Attack Surface of Multimodal Engineering Intelligence
items.summary: This article explores the security vulnerabilities and potential attack surfaces that arise when multimodal AI systems are used to interpret engineering blueprints.

items.title: Multimodal Gemma 4 Visual Regression & Patch Agent
items.summary: A developer explores the capabilities of Multimodal Gemma 4 for visual regression testing and automated patch generation, showcasing its potential in software development.

items.title: Google shipped three Gemini "Flash" models. Picking the wrong one could 6x your AI bill
items.summary: An analysis warns developers that choosing the incorrect Gemini 'Flash' model from Google could drastically increase their AI service costs due to varying pricing structures.
